x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Strategic Portfolio Management requires a dedicated plugin enabling AI-assisted demand scoring and portfolio optimization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Now Assist for SPM plugin (sn_spm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm SPM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.
